name: broadsheet-monorepo
description: Editorial frontend for Home Assistant — pnpm workspace root

pnpm.//onlyBuiltDependencies: pnpm 11 ignores postinstall scripts of unknown deps unless explicitly allowlisted. esbuild is here for completeness (vite needs it); protobufjs + sharp pulled in transitively by @xenova/transformers (Plan 4 memory embeddings). Without this, CI install fails with ERR_PNPM_IGNORED_BUILDS.
